data.name: Kingdom of Lust
data.detailed_description:
In the Kingdom of Lust game, you have to help two brave girls defeat the evil Koshchei the Immortal, who decided to attack the Kingdom and seize power. The game has dragons, minotaurs, werewolves, as well as ordinary inhabitants of the kingdom who want to help the girls achieve their goal!

The game is full of hand drawn sex scenes and animations, has the original soundtracks.

Don't forget to add the game to Wish List and join the discord server!
data.about_the_game:
In the Kingdom of Lust game, you have to help two brave girls defeat the evil Koshchei the Immortal, who decided to attack the Kingdom and seize power. The game has dragons, minotaurs, werewolves, as well as ordinary inhabitants of the kingdom who want to help the girls achieve their goal!

The game is full of hand drawn sex scenes and animations, has the original soundtracks.

Don't forget to add the game to Wish List and join the discord server!
data.short_description: In the Kingdom of Lust visual novel, you have to help two brave girls defeat the evil Koshchei the Immortal, who decided to attack the Kingdom and seize power. The game has dragons, minotaurs, werewolves, as well as ordinary inhabitants of the kingdom who want to help the girls achieve their goal!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® IV+
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 512 MB VRAM compatible with DirectX 9.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i5+
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 512 MB VRAM compatible with DirectX 9.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® Compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Intel® Pentium® IV+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Intel i5+
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL® compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
